memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Ada of Holland (1163-1205)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Ada of Holland (c. 1163–1205) was the daughter of Floris III, Count of Holland and his wife Ada of Huntingdon. She was the sister of Dirk VII, Count of Holland and William I, Count of Holland. 

In 11 …

zh.of, 's-Gravenhage, Zuid Holland, Netherl: 荷蘭-拉藍德丹 哈格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada of Holland於大約1163年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德丹 哈格時，她的父親Floris III van Holland23歲，母親Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland24歲。她和Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg至少有1個兒子。她去世於1201年11月15日在荷蘭霍蘭享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada of Holland于大约1163年出生在荷兰-拉藍德丹 哈格时，她的父亲Floris III van Holland23岁，母亲Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland24岁。她和Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg至少有1个儿子。她去世于1201年11月15日在荷兰霍蘭享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Howland
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roland  , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + land ‘land, territory’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In Old French literature it is borne by a legendary Frankish hero, a vassal of Charlemagne, whose exploits are told in the Chanson de Roland. The subject of the poem is Roland's death at the Battle of Roncesvalles in the Pyrenees in 778 , while protecting the rearguard of the Frankish army on its retreat from Spain. Roland is depicted in literature and legend as headstrong and impulsive. His devoted friendship with the prudent Oliver is also legendary.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Recent coinage, a feminine form of   Alan   influenced by   Amanda .

en.lifeSummary: When Ada of Holland was born about 1163, in The Hague, South Holland, Netherlands, her father, Floris III van Holland, was 23 and her mother, Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland, was 24. She had at least 1 son with Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg. She died on 15 November 1201, in Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada of Holland est née environ 1163, à La Haye, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Floris III van Holland, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg. Elle est décédée le 15 novembre 1201, à Holland, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ada of Holland um 1163 in Den Haag, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Floris III van Holland 23 und ihre Mutter Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland 24. Sie hatte mit Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 15. November 1201 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Holland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ada of Holland è nata il circa 1163 nel Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Floris III van Holland, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg. Morì il 15 novembre 1201, nel Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.of, 's-Gravenhage, Zuid Holland, Netherl: オランダズイド-hオランドデン ハアグ
ja.lifeSummary: Ada of Hollandが約1163年にオランダズイド-hオランドデン ハアグで生まれた時，父Floris III van Hollandは23歳，母Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Hollandは24歳であった。彼女はOtto I. Markgraf von Brandenburgとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1201年11月15日にオランダホーランドで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ada of Holland(이)가 대략 1163년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 든 하아그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Floris III van Holland(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1201년 11월 15일 네덜란드 홀랜드에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ada of Holland nasceu aproximadamente 1163, em Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Floris III van Holland, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg. Ela faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1201, em Holland, Países Baixos, com 39 anos.

ro.of, 's-Gravenhage, Zuid Holland, Netherl: Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada of Holland родилась около 1163 г. в местности ден хааг, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Floris III van Holland было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland, 24. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg. Она умерла 15 ноября 1201 г. в местности холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ada of Holland nació aproximadamente 1163, en Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Floris III van Holland, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Ada of Huntingdon Countess of Holland, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Otto I. Markgraf von Brandenburg. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1201, en Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 39 años.
